news.content_en: New models: Add pi-StepNFT, QuantVLA, Fast-ThinkAct, ATA, SRPO, LingBot-VA, RynnVLA-002 to LIBERO, SRPO to LIBERO Plus, X-VLA to RoboChallenge
news.content_zh: 新增模型：增加 pi-StepNFT，QuantVLA，Fast-ThinkAct，ATA，SRPO，LingBot-VA，RynnVLA-002 到 LIBERO, SRPO 到 LIBERO Plus，X-VLA 到 RoboChallenge

news.content_en: New models: Add VLA-JEPA, JEPA-VLA and Pose-VLA to LIBERO, VLA-JEPA to LIBERO Plus
news.content_zh: 新增模型：增加 VLA-JEPA, JEPA-VLA 和 Pose-VLA 到 LIBERO, VLA-JEPA 到 LIBERO Plus

news.content_en: New model: Add Xiaomi-Robotics-0 to LIBERO and CALVIN. 🎉 Wishing everyone a happy Lunar New Year! 🎉
news.content_zh: 新增模型：增加 Xiaomi-Robotics-0 到 LIBERO 和 CALVIN。春节前最后一次更新。🎉 祝大家新年快乐！ 🎉

news.content_en: New models: Add Abot-M0 to LIBERO, LIBERO Plus and RoboCasa-GR1-Tabletop; DM0 to RoboChallenge.
news.content_zh: 新增模型：增加 Abot-M0 到 LIBERO, LIBERO Plus 和 RoboCasa-GR1-Tabletop; 增加 DM0 到 RoboChallenge

news.content_en: 🚀 Major update: New Leaderboards: Three leaderboards of dexterous hand - Adroit, DexArt and Bi-DexHands - is available now! Check the Dex button for details.
news.content_zh: 🚀 重大更新: 新增页面和榜单: 三个灵巧手榜单 Adroit, DexArt 和 Bi-DexHands 现已上线！点击右上方 Dex 按钮查看详情。

news.content_en: 📌 Important update: New Feature: RL models filetrs in all benchmarks and home page; New models: Add Giga-Brain-0.1 and RDT-1B to RoboChallenge.
news.content_zh: 📌 重要更新: 新增功能: 所有基准测试和主页中RL模型筛选功能；新增模型: 增加 Giga-Brain-0.1 和 RDT-1B 到 RoboChallenge

news.content_en: 🚀 Major update: New Leaderboard: RoboCasa-GR1-Tabletop; New models: Add UnifoLM-VLA-0 to LIBERO, add pi-RL to Meta-World and CALVIN.
news.content_zh: 🚀 重大更新: 新增榜单: RoboCasa-GR1-Tabletop；新增模型：增加UnifoLM-VLA-0 到 LIBERO, 增加 pi-RL 到 Meta-World 和 CALVIN

news.content_en: New models: Add DreamVLA, Rlinf-VLA, pi-RL to LIBERO.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 DreamVLA, Rlinf-VLA, pi-RL 到 LIBERO

news.content_en: New models: Add NORA-1.5, Being-H0.5, EO-1 to LIBERO.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 NORA-1.5, Being-H0.5, EO-1 到 LIBERO

news.content_en: New models: Add DeepThinkVLA to LIBERO Plus, ACoT-VLA to LIBERO and LIBERO Plus.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 DeepThinkVLA 到 LIBERO Plus, ACoT-VLA 到 LIBERO 和 LIBERO Plus

news.content_en: 🚀 Major update: New Leaderboard: RoboChallenge, New Feature: Policy Setting filter in LIBERO; Bug Fixes: Link errors and inappropriate filter in LIBERO Plus.
news.content_zh: 🚀 重大更新: 新增榜单: RoboChallenge, 新增功能: LIBERO 策略设置筛选; 修复 Bugs: LIBERO Plus 中的链接错误和不恰当的筛选

news.content_en: New models: Add DeepThinkVLA, Dadu-Corki to LIBERO.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 DeepThinkVLA, Dadu-Corki 到 LIBERO

news.content_en: New model: Add RoboTron Mani to Meta-World and CALVIN.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 RoboTron Mani 到 Meta-World 和 CALVIN

news.content_en: New models: Add CronusVLA, InstructVLA, InternVLA-M1 to LIBERO.
news.content_zh: 新增模型: 增加 CronusVLA, InstructVLA, InternVLA-M1 到 LIBERO

news.content_en: 🚀 Website launched with LIBERO, LIBERO Plus, Meta-World, CALVIN benchmarks.
news.content_zh: 🚀 网站正式上线，支持 LIBERO, LIBERO Plus, Meta-World, CALVIN 基准测试
